_meta.description: Omega MegaCorp Design Intelligence Knowledge Base

entries.name: SHINY.NEW — Omega MegaCorp
entries.what_makes_it_special: Pure state machine replaces scroll — 8 scenes fire on timer, forcing forward-only pacing the user cannot skip. Conic-gradient rotated via @property CSS custom property because GSAP cannot tween gradient strings directly.
entries.the_unexpected: The artifact reveal is decided silently on §3 submit — all of §4 through §6 is pure theater for a decision already made.
entries.brief_injection: Make the system's decision feel like fate — compute the outcome first, then stage the theater of it arriving.
